text.title: PM Tools Overview Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the PM Tools Overview methodology end-to-end.

step.name: gather-pain-points
step.action: Compile 5-15 pain points the tool would address.

step.name: moscow-prioritise
step.action: Classify each as Must / Should / Could / Won't with evidence.

step.name: scan-market
step.action: List 3-10 candidates with reason for inclusion.

step.name: fit-gap-per-must
step.action: Evaluate fit/partial/gap per candidate per Must.
step.decision-gate: Halt if any candidate is 'fit' for every requirement (likely under-analysed).

step.name: shortlist-and-handoff
step.action: Shortlist 2-3 candidates; hand off to pm-tools-comparison for deeper PoC.
